content_of_post_to_comment: To be honest, sometimes I get scared of my anger at being a woman in this world. Because I need a job, I need to exist in this imperfect world, I can’t just lose it and be angry. I have to live, to support myself.
comment: I wonder if part of the fear is that anger gets treated as a liability only when it’s visible. A lot of institutions seem comfortable benefiting from women’s anger as labor, just not as expression.
